message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"16","subject":"Refactor logo generator frontend to use database API","description":"The logo generator routes now persist to database (Task #14), but frontend components may still reference the old in-memory implementation.

**Action:**
1. Audit logo generator frontend components
2. Ensure they call the updated API routes:
   - `/api/logo-generator/generate` (creates conversation in DB)
   - `/api/logo-generator/refine` (appends to DB)
   - `/api/logo-generator/chat` (appends to DB)
   - `/api/logo-generator/conversation/[id]` (fetches from DB)
3. Remove any references to in-memory Map storage
4. Test full logo generation flow (create, refine, chat, retrieve)
5. Verify conversations persist across server restarts

**Goal:** Frontend fully integrated with DB-persisted logo conversations.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-10T18:13:25.301Z"}
</teammate-message>

content.text: Perfect! Task #16 is officially assigned. Let me start by auditing the logo generator frontend components to see what needs to be updated.
